---
title: "\'Readings on the Four Gospels\'"
---

## \'Readings on the Four Gospels\'

**Author:** The Rev. Arthur Rawson Ashwell
**Imprint:** <i>MP</i> (August 1860-October 1864)

### Notes

This series ran intermittently over this period.  Some articles, not all, are signed A. R. A., but the whole can confidently be ascribed to Ashwell on the authority of CMY\'s statement to Alexander Macmillan in 1866.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
